00232|   const { address, isConnected, chainId: connectedChainId, connector } = useAccount()
00233|   const { connect, connectors } = useConnect()

00239|

00241|     if (!rawWalletClient) return undefined

00243| 
00244|     const sendTxClean = async (chainId: number, stepItem: { data: Record<string, unknown> }) => {
00245|       const client = getClient()
00246|       const chain = client?.chains?.find((c) => c.id === chainId)?.viemChain
00247|       if (!chain) throw new Error(`Chain ${chainId} not found in relay client`)

00250|         account: rawWalletClient.account ?? (stepItem.data.from as `0x${string}`),

00253|       })
00254|       const rawValue = (stepItem.data.value as string) || '0'
00255|       const value = /^0x/i.test(rawValue) ? hexToBigInt(rawValue as `0x${string}`) : BigInt(rawValue)
00256|       return wc.sendTransaction({
00257|         chain,
00258|         account: rawWalletClient.account ?? (stepItem.data.from as `0x${string}`),
00259|         to: stepItem.data.to as `0x${string}`,
00260|         data: stepItem.data.data as `0x${string}`,
00261|         value,
00262|       })
00263|     }
00264| 
00265|     return {
00266|       ...base,
00267|       supportsAtomicBatch: async () => false,
00268|       handleSendTransactionStep: async (chainId, stepItem) =>
00269|         sendTxClean(chainId, stepItem as { data: Record<string, unknown> }),
00270|       handleBatchTransactionStep: async (chainId, items) => {
00271|         for (const item of items) {
00272|           await sendTxClean(chainId, item as { data: Record<string, unknown> })
00273|         }
00274|         return 'batch'
00275|       },
